title: aeschynanthus marginatus
intro: Aeschynanthus marginatus, also known as the Goldfish Plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Gesneriaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The Goldfish Plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, offering potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties, as well as improving cardiovascular health and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aeschynanthus marginatus can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
